title: Zhe Tian Movie: Bei Guan Zhan Wang Teng

synonyms: Shrounding the Heavens Movie: Fighting Against Wang Teng with Copper Coffin
Zhe Tian Juchang Ban: Bei Guan Zhan Wang Teng
alternative_titles.en: Shrouding the Heavens: The Imperial Path
alternative_titles.ja: 遮天剧场版 背棺战王腾

synopsis:
Ye Fan and Wang Teng, two top geniuses, face each other in a fated battle. The Wang family from Beiyuan arrives with great power, while the Ji family’s elder is secretly plotting something, and Ji Ziyue is forced into a political marriage. Surrounded by enemies, Ye Fan becomes everyone’s target. As the Ancient Sacred Body clashes with ancient powers, who will rise as the true Great Emperor?

(Source: WeTV)
